div.p: Alignment: #[repr(C)] ensures predictable layout for assembly
x86-64 System V ABI: Callee-saved registers (must preserve): rbx, rbp, r12, r13, r14, r15 Context switch saves these to regs[0..6] before switching to scheduler.
Caller-saved (rax,rcx,rdx,rsi,rdi, r8-r11) are assumed garbage across yield.
